Electra Palace Athens

★★★★★
🏛️ Acropolis View🍸 Rooftop Bar👑 Luxury
from €280 /night
Check Availability

Overview

Iconic luxury hotel in the heart of Plaka with stunning rooftop pool and Acropolis views. Neoclassical elegance meets modern comfort.

Who Should Consider Electra Palace Athens

Electra Palace Athens is a 5-star luxury price-signal hotel in Plaka, with an Acropolis-view signal and a rooftop-bar signal. It is tagged for luxury, couples, views.

  • Compare the area on the Plaka hotel guide.
  • See broader criteria-based picks in Best Hotels in Athens.
  • Compare it with other Athens rooftop bar hotels.

Amenities

PoolSpaRestaurantGym

✓ Pros

  • Rooftop pool with Acropolis view
  • Prime Plaka location
  • Excellent service

✗ Cons

  • Premium pricing
  • Can be busy

Location

Located in Plaka, 5-10 min walk to the Acropolis.

🏛️ 5-10 min to Acropolis
🚇 5-10 min to metro
